title: fix(secrets): refresh TINYBIRD_INGEST_TOKEN in dev sops secrets
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Feeding the Tinybird
gist.blurb: Refreshed our internal development tokens so our local environments can properly track usage events again. Just keeping the gears turning behind the scenes!
gist.summary: Updated the Tinybird ingest token in development secrets to resolve 403 authentication errors during local testing.
gist.impact: Local development environments can now successfully log usage events without hitting invalid token errors.
gist.visual_concept: The pollinations bee mascot feeding a glowing token to a tiny bird (representing Tinybird analytics) inside a cozy garden shed (representing local dev).
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot feeding a glowing golden token to a tiny blue bird inside a cozy garden shed. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot feeding a glowing golden token to a tiny blue bird inside a cozy garden shed. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
